moments.author: Dan Loeb
moments.why: A one‑word tweet from the billionaire hedge‑fund manager reinforced bullish sentiment in crypto amid a volatile markets day.
moments.url: Coverage of Dan Loeb’s “HODL” tweet on Coindesk

moments.author: Sam Bankman‑Fried
moments.why: Even from prison via proxy, his post grabbed attention for timing with the stock market’s best quarterly performance in years.
moments.url: BeInCrypto coverage of SBF prison post

moments.author: Chris Johnson
moments.quote: Man… the love y’all have shown me … let’s bring back the ALS Ice Bucket Challenge. Grab a bucket, challenge 3 people …
moments.why: His call to revive the viral 2014 Ice Bucket Challenge sparked widespread athlete participation and fundraising momentum.
moments.url: AP News report on Chris Johnson’s Ice Bucket Challenge revival
